title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Backend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
